title: miliusa dioeca
intro: Miliusa dioeca, also known as the starfruit vine or yue huang shu, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Miliusa dioeca include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Miliusa dioeca is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
